scope: observational trait-path estimates conditional on the randomised supplemental interaction treatments; not a direct causal estimate of trait effects

A_flower.definition: percent of floral lip red-orange on early-season pre-treatment flowers

B_flower.definition: relative floral condensed tannins in early-season pre-treatment flowers

shared_adjustments.reason: randomised supplemental florivory assignment; natural florivory response excludes imposed damage

pathway_models.outcome_definition: average number of pollinator visits in 60 minutes, calculated as average visits in 15 minutes multiplied by four
pathway_models.exposure_or_denominator: pollinator visitor surveys; processed outcome standardised to 60 minutes
pathway_models.model: ols_hc3: outcome_z ~ A_z + B_z + Robbing_Y + Florivory_Y + Pollination_Y + Date_of_First_CH_Flower_z
pathway_models.interpretation: conditional observational association with pollinator visitation rate

pathway_models.outcome_definition: average percent flower tissue missing; raw response includes only natural florivory and is surveyed on plants with open CH flowers
pathway_models.exposure_or_denominator: raw records contain percent florivory on individual flowers and total open CH flowers per plant survey
pathway_models.model: ols_hc3: outcome_z ~ A_z + B_z + Robbing_Y + Florivory_Y + Pollination_Y + Date_of_First_CH_Flower_z
pathway_models.interpretation: conditional observational association with natural floral tissue loss

fitness_component_models.outcome_definition: average count of all chasmogamous fruits per plant per day
fitness_component_models.model: ols_hc3: outcome_z ~ A_z + B_z + A_z:B_z + Robbing_Y + Florivory_Y + Pollination_Y + Date_of_First_CH_Flower_z
fitness_component_models.interpretation: fitness-component interaction surface; not full lifetime fitness

fitness_component_models.outcome_definition: average count of seeds in each chasmogamous fruit
fitness_component_models.model: ols_hc3: outcome_z ~ A_z + B_z + A_z:B_z + Robbing_Y + Florivory_Y + Pollination_Y + Date_of_First_CH_Flower_z
fitness_component_models.interpretation: fitness-component interaction surface on the observed seed subset; not full lifetime fitness

guardrails: Do not interpret treatment-adjusted trait coefficients as causal trait manipulation effects.
Do not pool A and B trait definitions with alternate floral traits without a new predeclared analysis ID.
Do not use raw treatment-induced changes in floral traits as the primary A or B predictor; primary traits are pre-treatment.
Do not call the fitness-component models D2 without a separate identification review.
Do not calibrate c_AD from these models.
